title: Metabolomics Profile of the Secretome of Space-Flown Oligodendrocytes.
author: Vergnes L Foucaud B Cepeda C Espinosa-Jeffrey A
content: S-EPMC10528075 PMC10528075 Metabolomics Profile of the Secretome of Space-Flown Oligodendrocytes. Intracranial hypertension (ICP) and visual impairment intracranial pressure (VIIP) are some of the sequels of long-term space missions.
